untranslatable_reason: Signal requires fundamental data (Price-to-Book ratio, Price-to-Earnings ratio, 5-year historical returns ranking, earnings release calendar data) which are not available in the ALLOWED INDICATORS list. The backtest engine only has access to technical price/volume indicators. The core logic—exploiting mean reversion around earnings announcements in undervalued stocks—cannot be fully expressed with available indicators. Partial translation uses volume spike as a proxy for event-driven activity, but this is insufficient without earnings calendar and valuation metrics.
translation_notes: Only volume condition (vol_ratio_20 > 1.0) can be translated from the available indicators. Missing required data: Price-to-Book percentile, Price-to-Earnings percentile, historical return ranking, earnings release dates, and fundamental valuation screens. Direction set to CONTEXT_DEPENDENT as signal intent is to trade reversals (long weak stocks or short strong ones) based on behavioral reversals. Hold period set to 5 days matching post-earnings window. Stop loss set to 3% as specified.
